title: Publisher Buffers, Drain, Admission, and Bounded Batching · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs publisher buffers, drain, admission, and bounded batching from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the publisher admission and buffer-pressure controller. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for publisher admission and buffer-pressure controller after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evi…
objectives: Treat amqplib publish and sendToQueue return values as writable-buffer admission signals rather than delivery confirmations or Promises.
Pause admission after false, coordinate a bounded drain waiter, handle close and abort, and avoid lost wakeups or listener leaks.
Propagate publisher capacity to HTTP or job admission with queue, byte, time, tenant, and rejection budgets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish Boolean Contract · changed case · Review Publish Boolean Contract
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 9055 in a canary consumer reading old and new envelope versions. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to propagate blocked, byte capacity, publish boolean, and drain state into upstream admission; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then lose a quorum member and recompute majority availability. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Treat amqplib publish and sendToQueue return values as writable-buffer admission signals rather than delivery confirmations or Promises.

Which action demonstrates Publish Boolean Contract without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Publish Boolean Contract · changed case · Review Publish Boolean Contract.
